gavel Legal support_agent Support

Scholar's Guide

Welcome to the Repository of Knowledge. Here, the High Scribes have compiled the essential laws and technical scrolls required to navigate the Relics of Rune & Iron.

search
fingerprint Reference #001

Account & Sigils

Managing your Scribe's credentials, linking external magic-sigils, and resetting soul-bound authentication keys.

SECURITY IDENTITY
view_in_ar Reference #042

3D Pipeline Calibration

Technical specifications for high-fidelity artifact projection and real-time mesh rendering.

inventory_2 Reference #089

Vault Security

Protocols for protecting your rare rune-stone collection and preventing unauthorized ethereal access.

unarchive Reference #112

Asset Exporting

Instructions for moving discovered artifacts into other realms or commercial marketplaces without losing magical essence.

LOGISTICS MARKET

"Knowledge is the heaviest armor one can wear."

— Grand Master Alistair

The High Artisan’s Compendium

  • 01.

    The Law of Conservation

    Every rune used requires a catalyst of equal spiritual weight.

  • 02.

    Static Mesh Manifestation

    Artifacts must be perfectly sealed before inter-realm travel.

  • 03.

    Sigil Conflict Resolution

    Handling unstable enchantments that overlap in the same grid.

Cannot find the scroll you seek?

If the archives are incomplete or a technical curse persists, you may request a direct audience with the High Archivist.

Contact the High Archivist send

Response time: 1-2 lunar cycles
